steps.title: Rewrite line l
steps.content:
Start with $3y+12x=5$. Move the $12x$ term to the other side and divide by $3$:
$$3y=-12x+5$$
$$y=-4x+\frac{5}{3}$$

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content: In $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m$. Line $l$ has slope $-4$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular shortcut
steps.content:
A perpendicular slope is the negative reciprocal:
$$m_n=-\frac{1}{-4}=\frac{1}{4}=0.25$$
